title: Family Game Night 家庭游戏
scene: 一家人晚上一起玩桌游。

lines.en: It is Friday night! Game night!
Yes! What are we playing tonight?
How about a board game? I got a new one.
lines.zh: 玩桌游怎么样？我买了一个新的。

lines.en: It is called "Word Race". You need to spell words fast.
lines.zh: 叫"单词竞速"。你需要快速拼写单词。

lines.en: That sounds fun. I am good at spelling!
lines.zh: 听起来很有趣。我擅长拼写！

lines.en: We will see about that. Let me read the rules.
lines.zh: 那可不一定。我来读一下规则。

lines.en: Of course. The more players, the better!
I am going to win tonight!
